reference: This is Archana. I am using Hispen fifty mg tablets and Aliver tablets in this cycle. Actually, in the last cycle, I used Ovasheild and HSG injection, and my follicular study showed that on the 23rd day, a follicle had ruptured. I used Meprane tablets. Please advise me if my treatment is correct.
text: This is Archana. I am using Hispen 50mg tablets and Allover tablets in this cycle. Actually, in the last cycle, I used Ovashield and HSG injection, and my follicular study showed that on the 23rd day, a follicle had ruptured. I used Meprane tablets. Please advise me if my treatment is correct.
